languages.text: {n}Мутный взгляд больного цепляется за лицо женщины, края приоткрытых губ растягиваются в слабом подобии улыбки. Его мать, практически не моргая, смотрит в ответ.{/n}
{n}The patient's clouded gaze is locked on the woman's face, the corners of his parted lips stretching into the faint semblance of a smile. His mother stares back, almost without blinking.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Мутный взгляд больного цепляется за лицо женщины, края приоткрытых губ растягиваются в слабом подобии улыбки. Его мать, практически не моргая, смотрит в ответ.{/n}

{n}The patient's clouded gaze is locked on the woman's face, the corners of his parted lips stretching into the faint semblance of a smile. His mother stares back, almost without blinking.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der glasige Blick des Patienten ruht auf dem Gesicht der Frau, als er seine Mundwinkel zu einem schwachen Lächeln verzieht. Seine Mutter erwidert seinen Blick, ohne zu zwinkern.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The patient's clouded gaze is locked on the woman's face, the corners of his parted lips stretching into the faint semblance of a smile. His mother stares back, almost without blinking.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der glasige Blick des Patienten ruht auf dem Gesicht der Frau, als er seine Mundwinkel zu einem schwachen Lächeln verzieht. Seine Mutter erwidert seinen Blick, ohne zu zwinkern.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le regard voilé du patient est rivé sur le visage de la femme, et les commissures de sa bouche entrouverte s'étirent en un semblant de sourire. Sa mère lui rend son regard sans ciller ou presque.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The patient's clouded gaze is locked on the woman's face, the corners of his parted lips stretching into the faint semblance of a smile. His mother stares back, almost without blinking.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le regard voilé du patient est rivé sur le visage de la femme, et les commissures de sa bouche entrouverte s'étirent en un semblant de sourire. Sa mère lui rend son regard sans ciller ou presque.{/n}

languages.text: {n}病人那迷蒙的目光停留在女人脸上，他微微张开的嘴角勉强露出一丝笑意。他的母亲也回望着他，几乎不曾眨眼。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The patient's clouded gaze is locked on the woman's face, the corners of his parted lips stretching into the faint semblance of a smile. His mother stares back, almost without blinking.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}病人那迷蒙的目光停留在女人脸上，他微微张开的嘴角勉强露出一丝笑意。他的母亲也回望着他，几乎不曾眨眼。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La mirada nublada del paciente no se aparta de la cara de la mujer, y las esquinas de sus labios se elevan ligeramente, formando una especie de sonrisa. Su madre le devuelve la mirada, casi sin parpadear.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The patient's clouded gaze is locked on the woman's face, the corners of his parted lips stretching into the faint semblance of a smile. His mother stares back, almost without blinking.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La mirada nublada del paciente no se aparta de la cara de la mujer, y las esquinas de sus labios se elevan ligeramente, formando una especie de sonrisa. Su madre le devuelve la mirada, casi sin parpadear.{/n}

languages.text: {n}患者のぼんやりとした視線は女性の顔にまとわりつき、開いた唇の端がかすかに微笑みのように伸びている。母親はほとんどまばたきもせずに見つめ返す。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The patient's hazy gaze clings to the woman's face, the edges of her ajar lips stretching into a faint semblance of a smile. His mother stares back almost unblinkingly.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Hastanın bulanık bakışları, kadının yüzüne kilitleniyor. Aralık dudaklarının köşeleri belli belirsiz bir gülümsemeye dönüşüyor. Annesi neredeyse hiç gözünü kırpmadan ona karşılık veriyor.{/n}
